calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-12-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant/Defendant Tae Kim appeared in Pro Per, on behalf of Union French Cleaners, with the assistance of court certified Korean interpreter, Ted Kim (#300380).
Respondent/Plaintiff Jasmine Nazari is absent.

This cause comes on regularly for Trial De Novo. All parties are sworn.

Appellant/Defendant Tae Kim testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit A - A statement from Union French Cleaners' workers
Exhibit B - Email Re: price for the dress
Exhibit C - Tae Kim's statement Re: Timeline of the Incident
Exhibit D - Receipt

Respondent/Plaintiff Jasmine Nazari is absent. No testimony and/or documentary evidence is introduced.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court orders judgement in favor of Appellant/Defendant Union French Cleaners. All introduced documentary evidence are returned to the offering party. Judge: Honorable Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: C. Cheng; Reporter: Not reported. (606)
